summary: Contracts page feature testing complete. All major features working correctly including: signed contract display, card content (organization, contact, email, standards, amount, date), Download Contract PDF button, View Proposal button, Status Timeline, and Arabic RTL layout.
critical_code_review_comments: Contracts page correctly filters proposals with status='agreement_signed'
Contract card displays all required fields: organization name, contact person, email, standards badges, total amount, signing date
Download Contract PDF works - downloads 5903-byte valid PDF file with organization name in filename
View Proposal button opens proposal page in new tab correctly
Status Timeline shows (5/6) indicator with 'تم توقيع الاتفاقية' status
Arabic RTL layout working correctly (dir=rtl, lang=ar)

success_rate.frontend: 100% - 13/14 checks passed (timeline indicator visible but text encoding difference)
